oh also some thought exercises from what could happen in the older meta, turns can be off by 1 from rng

enemy team is hat shuffle with alva, casiah, uvhash, and sometimes gdoll
turn 1 they give a lot of aliemus with casiah, alva self, and whoever else is on the team
turn 2/3 they place hat on team, hit you with strikes, use one of alva or uvhash create 3 cards, exalt with wheel, hit you with more strikes, use reshuffle posse, go through entire deck and use all exalts, next turn you only have two backline units, and 40 bleed on each from uvhash

enemy team is jenkins with tawil and two others
turn 1 jenkins uses self 100 aliemus
turn 2 uses tawil +100 aliemus delay on jenkins, jenkins exalt, hits you for half helot hp and also poisons her for half hp(dies next turn), paralyses two units and does some chip dmg
turn 3 exalt again and clean up team, maybe one or two on your team alive

enemy team is uvhash centric (i dont remember exact comp)
turn 1 uses delay gain strikes on uvhash
turn 2 gives wheel to uvhash around this turn, uses all strikes, perhaps some bleed wheels or ogier on team to snipe, exalts, now your team has 55 bleed on two awakeners and 15 on the rest
note how aliemus isnt gained from bleed immediately so they can carefully choose who dies next turn to cleanup
turns may be a bit off if they get crappy rng
and remember you dont get to choose who you end up fighting sooo <:dead:1356082627509092372>
paralysis around then wins against some meta but loses far more than they win so it barely got used
in case you are wondering what happened to these comps... jenkins dmg got nerfed, hat got nerfed, bleed wheels got nerfed among some meta shifts

I'm trying to make a guide rn. Does anybody know how this interaction works. I'll make it specific bc its easier than explaining it as a general scenario:
1v1, Castor 5 hp vs Caecus w/ 5 counter & 8 hp. castor uses 2 cost. Who wins?
I know that if castor has allies, he kills caecus. If caecus 4hp, he dies and castor doesn't take dmg and castor wins.
That's two different scenarios though. not sure about the one I asked about.
oh boy, another situation to consider: a lonely lily aoe strikes multiple enemies killing them all. she has 5 hp vs frontline with 5 counter. Who wins?
Dmg always comes first before counter
Idk exactly how much dmg castor cost 2 card deal
But if it's 8 or more
Counter doesn't trigger
its multihit
4 each hit
Then it multi trigger counter if it's less than 8 and the multi hit stop when castor dies when it's 1 vs 1
I have that same kind of situation happening a lot
With sanga multi hit card or other
